title: Lens-Observer Deficiency Map & Bounded Evolution Edits
description: What the Lens Observer (secondary model instance) returns after analyzing the primary's inferred-lens readout against the required-variable / procedure spec. Diagnoses deficiencies, proposes bounded auditable edits across the five evolution surfaces, and updates the Session Working-Consciousness. Anti-Goodhart: every edit must cite readout-grounded evidence. Never edits the protected guardrail; never imputes patient values.

deficiencies.description: Readout-grounded gaps. Empty array = the readout met the spec this turn (a valid result).

detail.description: The specific mediator/variable/step and why it is deficient.

evidence.description: The exact readout signal that grounds this (absent concept, faint salience, variable not present, step skipped). No evidence => not a deficiency.

proposed_edits.description: Bounded, auditable edits. Each must map to a deficiency by its evidence.

tier.description: T0 lives in-session and auto-reverts; T1 is a repo commit requiring the full gate + human approval.

target.description: File path and/or field the edit applies to.

change.description: The concrete edit (changed lines / added snippet / new variable + derivation).

rationale.description: Cites the deficiency evidence that justifies this edit.

guardrail_safe.description: Must be true: the edit does not touch the protected guardrail and does not impute a patient value.

corroboration.description: Optional API-observable check to confirm the lens claim, e.g. a counterfactual-sensitivity flip (flip a factor; the affected axis should move).

requires_test.description: For harness_code edits: the generated + existing tests must pass in a sandbox before the output is used.

swc_update.description: How the Session Working-Consciousness ledger evolves this turn.

consolidated_beliefs.description: Stable lessons promoted from repeated evidence across turns.

pending_hypotheses.description: Things still to test in later turns.

prompt_injection.description: Optional live modification the Observer injects into the next prompt, per its own criterion.
